title: ハジけろ☆プールサイド

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The time has come! I'm going to show everyone at
the pool how super fun I really am!

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Um, Scarlet, how come you're wearing your
school swimsuit? I thought we were just gonna
hang out?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is no time for fun and games! Today's the real
test!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I don't get it, but I'll join you!

Eager to showcase her polished reactions, Daiwa
Scarlet starts playing in earnest.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! Oh my gosh! Staaahp! ♪ The water's, like, literally freezing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yikes! That water slide is, like, soooo up there!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff. Well, Spe? Did all those reactions seem fun and natural?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Not sure what's going on here, but yeah, totally!

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, anyone else want to order anything? One
sec... I'd like one whipped vanilla frappe, please!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Food, huh? All right, I'll take a large curry and a
large ramen...

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text: You're that hungry?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, apparently. All this fun is hard work, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. She's really taking this stuff seriously, isn't
she?

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
You think? I feel like she takes everything super
seriously, though.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Scarlet, look! They're having a swimsuit
dance competition!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A dance competition... That sounds like the
perfect opportunity to show how fun I am!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Let's do it! Time to show off our moves, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Look at her! She's in her school swimsuit!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text: Why's she scowling like that?! She's hysterical!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (Yes! Yes! They're seeing how fun I am!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
(But I can't let up! I have to focus on dancing until
the very end!)
And so the day comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Great job! Looks like we all had a ton of fun!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So, everyone, was I funny today?

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text: You were hilarious! Just like always!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean nothing seemed different today?

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Nope. You're always so serious about everything.
I don't think I'll ever get tired of it.

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
But you were especially hilarious today! Let's
hang out again sometime soon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you, from before. Fancy seeing you here.
choice_data_list:
On your way home? Were you hanging out with
friends?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And I tried really hard to be less of a
stick-in-the-mud...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I'm not actually as boring as I thought
I was.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Still, I think my efforts paid off today. I'm just
going to keep tackling things head-on as they
come my way.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thanks a lot for listening! See you later!

She continues her journey home with a spring in
her step and a smile on her face—the face of
someone who's anything but boring.

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you were, like, weirdly overenthusiastic.
Which made it even funnier, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text: Was she always that animated, though?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! Scarlet's always been on the wild side!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You should have seen that dual-wield slipper
technique she used against Vodka that one time!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey, Spe! You've said enough! Stop!
Please!

Her shouts of protest echo through the air. It
seems like all her hard work has made her a
source of surreal comedy.
